statement: In every magma, Equation 1605 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (x * z))`) implies Equation 2627 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * y)) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0329
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) y)) u)
